definition: A cause or reason, often more specifically causal than the broader paccaya.
notes: The project prefers cause because the term often marks a more direct causal role than the broader conditionality language of paccaya. Reason is acceptable in explanatory prose when the line leans more rhetorical or justificatory than metaphysical.

context_rules.context: In most doctrinal and analytical contexts
In explanatory prose where a justificatory or explanatory tone is stronger than strict causality
